summary: Server refactoring tests complete. All 40 backend API tests passed (100%). All 8 router modules working correctly. server.py reduced from 1214 lines to ~105 lines. All route paths remain identical and functional after the split.
critical_code_review_comments: Excellent refactoring: server.py now ~105 lines (down from 1214), clean orchestrator pattern
8 router modules correctly separated by domain: mission_control, athletes, support_pods, events, advocacy, program, admin, debug
services/startup.py cleanly encapsulates the seed/load/recompute pipeline
db_client.py provides shared MongoDB connection across all modules
models.py centralizes all Pydantic request/response schemas
All imports working correctly across modules
seed_data_creation: TEST_REFACTOR prefixed data created during testing: notes, actions, events, recommendations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Server refactoring verified. All routes in 8 router modules tested. MongoDB persistence working. API URL: https://profile-billing-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Phase 2 persistence active. Startup order: athletes → events → event_notes → recommendations → recompute.

mission_control_router: GET /api/mission-control — returns priorityAlerts, athletesNeedingAttention, upcomingEvents, programSnapshot
athletes_router: GET /api/athletes/invalid_id — returns error for invalid ID
support_pods_router: GET /api/support-pods/{athlete_id} — returns full pod data with actions, timeline, health
events_router: POST /api/events — creates new event, persists to MongoDB
GET /api/events/{id}/prep — returns prep data with checklist
POST /api/events/{id}/notes — creates note, persists to MongoDB
GET /api/events/{id}/summary — returns event summary with stats
admin_router: GET /api/admin/status — returns Phase 2 status with 10 persisted, 2 in-memory

page_loads: Mission Control: 4 priority alerts, 12 athletes monitoring
Support Pod: athlete_1 pod data loaded via API (UI may redirect)
Admin Status: Phase 2 indicator, 10 persisted collections

verified_refactoring_features: server.py reduced from 1214 lines to ~105 lines
8 router modules properly registered with api_router prefix
models.py: All Pydantic models imported correctly
All route paths identical to pre-refactor
